text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Basic Needs > Holiday Donations 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY THRIFT STORE SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used low cost goods for families in the area that have been donated. Proceeds go toward Habitat for Humanity's affordable homeownership program. Donations and volunteers welcome. 211 E Cascade Avenue Sisters, OR 97759 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Store: Monday-Saturday 10am-5pm Donations accepted: Tuesday-Saturday 10am-1pm Email (541) 549-1740 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SISTERS HABITAT FOR HUMANITY SISTERS HABITAT THRIFT STORE
